name: Avaya LLC
lede: Avaya runs four capability centers across four Indian cities. Bengaluru, Gurugram, Hyderabad and Pune, covering gbs, built over 22 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Avaya office in India. We map four, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Avaya operate in India?
faq.a: Avaya operates 4 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Avaya have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Avaya's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Gurugram, Hyderabad and Pune.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Avaya run in India?
faq.a: Avaya runs gbs centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Avaya's India GCCs?
faq.a: Avaya's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Avaya's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 25 leaders at Avaya's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
